diagrams.title: Unary Operations Classification
diagrams.description: Shows the three unary operations and their effects on a Student relation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how unary operations work on single relation

diagrams.title: Binary Operations Classification
diagrams.description: Classification of binary operations with examples
elements: Example with two relations R and S
diagrams.purpose: Understand binary operations and their outputs

diagrams.title: Join Types Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between Theta Join, Equijoin, and Natural Join
elements: Natural Join (all common =) - subset of Equijoin
Outer Join extensions - Left, Right, Full

diagrams.title: Selection vs Projection Visual
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of Selection (horizontal) and Projection (vertical) operations
elements: Arrow pointing right showing row selection
Arrow pointing down showing column projection
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between horizontal and vertical filtering
